notes: Solid Tetris implementation with SRS wall kicks, DAS, ghost piece, hold, and proper scoring; minor issue with the DAS repeat logic (timer reset to DAS_DELAY - DAS_REPEAT rather than using a proper repeat interval) and the UI panel slightly overflows the canvas width at higher scores, but overall very playable.

An exceptionally well-made Tetris clone featuring SRS wall kicks, 7-bag randomization, ghost piece, hold queue, and infinity lock delay; the only minor flaw is using 4x4 matrices for all pieces which slightly offsets rotations for 3x3 pieces, and relying on browser auto-repeat for soft drops.

A solid and mostly complete Tetris with hold, ghost, scoring, levels, and wall kicks, but it lacks polish such as fuller next queue display and has some control/state quirks that keep it from feeling flawless.
